headline: INTERNATIONAL PAPER TO RELEASE SECOND-QUARTER 2026 EARNINGS ON JULY 30, 2026
summary: International Paper (NYSE: IP; LSE: IPC) will release second-quarter 2026 earnings on July 30, 2026, before the opening of the New York Stock Exchange.
